items.final_wording: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.

source.title: Diagnosis and Treatment of Hyperprolactinemia: An Endocrine Society Clinical Practice Guideline
source.jurisdiction: International specialty guideline; UAE laboratory, prescribing, imaging and referral policy governs local use
source.population: Nonpregnant and pregnant people with elevated prolactin, suspected medication-related hyperprolactinaemia or prolactinoma-related context.
source.setting: Endocrine evaluation of an elevated prolactin result and longitudinal specialist review.
source.exclusions: Exact for confirming result context, reviewing physiological, medicine, renal, thyroid and pituitary causes, selected imaging context and clinician follow-up. It does not infer a cause or authorise treatment.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.

items.rationale: The exact diagnosis section supports result source and date, symptom and negative context and clinician-reviewed prolactin laboratory documentation without asserting hyperprolactinaemia.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician review of medicine, renal, thyroid, physiological and pituitary context and already performed imaging without assigning a cause.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 2.1–3.3 — cause, medicine and imaging evaluation

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician review of medicine, renal, thyroid, physiological and pituitary context and already performed imaging without assigning a cause.

items.rationale: The exact cause-evaluation section supports focused endocrine assessment and previous specialist correspondence without assigning a medicine, renal, thyroid or pituitary cause.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician-led symptom, laboratory, imaging, adverse-effect, pregnancy and follow-up review. Medicine names, doses and treatment instructions are excluded.

added_items.final_wording: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.

source.title: Diagnosis and Treatment of Hyperprolactinemia: An Endocrine Society Clinical Practice Guideline
source.jurisdiction: International specialty guideline; UAE laboratory, prescribing, imaging and referral policy governs local use
source.population: Nonpregnant and pregnant people with elevated prolactin, suspected medication-related hyperprolactinaemia or prolactinoma-related context.
source.setting: Endocrine evaluation of an elevated prolactin result and longitudinal specialist review.
source.exclusions: Exact for confirming result context, reviewing physiological, medicine, renal, thyroid and pituitary causes, selected imaging context and clinician follow-up. It does not infer a cause or authorise treatment.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.

added_items.rationale: The exact diagnosis section supports result source and date, symptom and negative context and clinician-reviewed prolactin laboratory documentation without asserting hyperprolactinaemia.

added_items.final_wording: Supports clinician review of medicine, renal, thyroid, physiological and pituitary context and already performed imaging without assigning a cause.
